query: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' ORDER BY table_name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 1grUzB66oStVVFP.root --database gPiHJoB3NKeoE8WP6B5f8y --execute SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' ORDER BY table_name;
